violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. -Raw ground meat was stored above whole muscle beef and pork in meat cooler.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floor edges in kitchen and floors in walk in freezer need cleaned.
Receptacles, covers/lids, adequate number, clean, insect/rodent proof, storage, frequency, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
